policy: Only ideas with status=approved should be built.

items.title: Bad Idea VC
items.one_liner: Pitch a terrible startup and get a dead-serious VC memo.
items.notes: Strong artifact output and clean browser-only implementation.

items.title: Apology Generator
items.one_liner: Paste what you said and get the apology you should have sent instead.
items.notes: Immediate premise, useful result, cheap to ship.

items.title: Petty Translator
items.one_liner: Translate one bitter thought into therapist, HR, villain, and petty modes.
items.notes: Strong comparison mechanic and screenshot-friendly output.

items.title: Ghosted Response Simulator
items.one_liner: Paste a dead chat and get five dramatic fake reasons you got ghosted.
items.notes: Clear social hook and low implementation cost.

items.title: Meeting Tax Ledger
items.one_liner: Track how much salary and soul a meeting is burning in real time.
items.notes: Borderline duplicate of existing meeting-themed builds. Needs differentiation before approval.

items.title: Excuse Printer
items.one_liner: Generate a polished excuse receipt for being late, flaky, or suspiciously unavailable.
items.notes: Receipt mechanic makes it visually distinct and easy to share.
